name: visigner
description: Visigner — a single-install design toolkit for Claude Code, built on one shared core. Bundles landing/detail-page, app & web UI, design systems, brand identity, UX, design-to-code, and conversion skills, a global image service (latest OpenAI/Gemini models), and Claude Design (claude.ai/design) publishing, plus review agents and slash commands.

plugins.name: visigner
plugins.description: Everything design in one install, on one core: landing & Korean 상세페이지/Wadiz pages, app/web UI, design tokens & systems, brand identity, UX flows, design-to-code (React/Tailwind/shadcn), conversion/marketing, a global image service (generate assets via gpt-image-2 / gemini-3-pro-image — free ChatGPT/codex OAuth or API key), and one-command publishing to Claude Design — plus design-critic & a11y-audit agents and friendly commands.
